name: Rillet
description: Rillet — AI-native accounting platform with REST API for invoices, payments, credit memos and journal entries

seo.title: Rillet — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Rillet: Rillet — AI-native accounting platform with REST API for invoices, payments, credit memos and journal entries

when_to_use: AI-powered invoice creation and journal entry automation
REST API integration for payment and credit memo workflows
Syncing accounting entries from payment processors automatically

pros: REST API covers invoices, payments, JEs
Fast close workflows vs NetSuite-era tools
Designed for finance teams at tech companies
cons: Young product, still filling feature gaps
Limited track record at enterprise scale
review.verdict: Compelling modern alternative to legacy GL software — credible for tech finance teams willing to be early.
review.best_for: Venture-backed tech companies wanting modern, API-driven accounting with fast close.
review.not_for: Conservative enterprises or regulated industries needing deep established vendor track record.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
